name: Fresh Apple Cake 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, stir together apples and sugar until combined.
3. Add the dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt) and stir well until incorporated.
4. In a separate bowl, beat eggs, oil, and vanilla extract until smooth.
5. Pour the wet mixture into the dry mixture and stir until thoroughly moistened.
6. Stir in the chopped pecans or walnuts.
7. Pour the batter into a greased 13x9x2 inch baking pan.
8. Bake for 50 to 60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
